visual_description: Three men in dark clothing stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with ornate furniture and glassware; one man in the center holds a wand pointed forward, flanked by two others also holding wands. A fourth man in a jacket and glasses stands facing them, looking forward with a neutral expression. The room’s low lighting casts shadows, emphasizing the tense, confrontational posture of the group.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable background noise or inflection.
